details.additional_notes: Two reps will attend the speaker dinner the night before.

chat_history.content:
Hi — I can help you plan your pharma speaker program. We’ll go through: your information, product & topic, schedule, speaker, venue, and a few final details. Compliance-approved options will be used along the way, and most requests are reviewed within one business day.

First, what’s your name?
open the pharma speaker program form for a new request

Absolutely — let’s start a new pharma speaker program request.

What’s your name?
James Oliver

Thanks, James Oliver.

What email should we use to reach you?
not-an-email

That doesn’t look like a valid email address.

What email should we use to reach you?
james@example.com

Thanks — I’ve got your email as james@example.com.

Let’s move to Product & Topic. Which product is this program for?
what are the available products?

Here are the available products:
- 101 — Cardiomax XR
- 102 — Oncoshield
- 103 — GlycoControl 500
- 104 — NeuroAxis

Which product is the program about?

Got it — the product is Cardiomax XR.

Which topic should the speaker cover?
- 201 — Managing Resistant Hypertension
- 202 — New ACE Inhibitor Guidelines (2025)
- 203 — Cardiomax XR — Initial Patient Selection
- 212 — Cardiomax XR Safety in Renal Impairment
what topics can I pick from?

Here are the available topics for Cardiomax XR:

- 201 — Managing Resistant Hypertension
- 202 — New ACE Inhibitor Guidelines (2025)
- 203 — Cardiomax XR — Initial Patient Selection
- 212 — Cardiomax XR Safety in Renal Impairment

Which topic should the speaker cover?

Great — I’ve got the topic as Managing Resistant Hypertension.

What date are you targeting for the program?
next Tuesday

That date is too soon — the target date must be at least 14 days from today.

What date are you targeting instead? Please send a specific date.
in 45 days

Got it — I’ve saved your target date as 2026-06-26.

Next, let’s choose the speaker. Would you like to see the currently certified speaker options for Cardiomax XR?
no alternates, let's move on

Understood — no backup speaker.

Who would you like to invite as the primary speaker?

Available certified speakers:
- 301 — Dr. Patricia Chen
- 302 — Dr. Marcus Reilly
- 307 — Dr. Linda Okonkwo
- 309 — Dr. Emma Sutherland
- 312 — Dr. Hassan Ahmadi
who can I pick from?

You can choose any of these currently certified speakers for this product:

- 301 — Dr. Patricia Chen
- 302 — Dr. Marcus Reilly
- 307 — Dr. Linda Okonkwo
- 309 — Dr. Emma Sutherland
- 312 — Dr. Hassan Ahmadi

Who would you like to invite as the primary speaker?
who do you recommend?

My top speaker picks are the recommended compliant options for this product, ranked by speaker tier and recent event activity.

Which one would you like to choose as your primary speaker?
patricia chen

Great — I’ve set Dr. Patricia Chen as your primary speaker.

Next, about how many attendees are you expecting?
yes, let me add a backup

Sounds good — I’ve noted that you want to include a backup venue.

How many people are you expecting?

Got it — Dr. Marcus Reilly is set as your primary speaker.

How many people are you expecting?
about 50 people

Got it — expecting about 50 attendees.

Which venue would you like to use as the primary venue?

Approved venue options:
- 401 — The Capital Grille
- 402 — Ruth's Chris Steak House
- 403 — The St. Regis Houston
- 404 — Eddie V's Prime Seafood
- 405 — Hyatt Regency Chicago
- 406 — The Westin San Diego
- 407 — Fogo de Chão Brazilian
- 408 — University Club of Denver
can you look up reviews for The Capital Grille?

I found Google reviews for several Capital Grille locations, but there are multiple matches nationwide and Yelp isn’t available right now.

A few examples from Google:
- Parsippany, NJ — 4.7 stars, 1,209 reviews
- Miami, FL — 4.7 stars, 2,622 reviews
- Washington, DC — 4.6 stars, 2,686 reviews
- Troy, MI — 4.6 stars, 1,806 reviews

Which city/location should I check for The Capital Grille?  
Just a note: looking up reviews doesn’t save the venue selection — for the form, the saved venue still has to come from the approved list.
the Boston one

For The Capital Grille in Boston, I found:

- 900 Boylston St, Boston, MA 02115
- Google rating: 4.6
- Google reviews: 1,461

I couldn’t pull Yelp because that integration isn’t configured right now.

Since The Capital Grille is already your selected approved primary venue, we’re all set on the venue section. I’ll move on to the final details.
yes, use 401 — no backup venue

Confirmed — primary venue is The Capital Grille, and no backup venue.

What’s the main priority factor for this program?
speaker matters most

Got it — I’ve noted that the speaker is the top priority.

Do you want the ops team to call you to discuss this request?
two reps will attend the speaker dinner the night before

Thanks — I’ve added that note: two reps will attend the speaker dinner the night before.

Do you want the ops team to call you to discuss this request?
no I don't need an ops call

Perfect — I’ve noted that no ops follow-up call is needed.

Your full recap is now on screen. Please take a quick look and let me know if everything looks right to submit.
yes, show me the recap
Here’s your recap. Please review it and let me know if it looks good to submit.
actually change the topic to the ACE inhibitor guidelines one

Done — I’ve updated the topic to **New ACE Inhibitor Guidelines (2025)**.

Would you like me to show the updated recap before you submit?
submit it
Submitted for intake review.
actually change the speaker to 302

I can still help update it here, but since we were at the final review stage, here’s the current recap again with the latest details visible.

If you want, I can change the primary speaker to **302 — Dr. Marcus Reilly** and then reshow the updated recap for confirmation.
